module_info.docstring:
P1 Core Tests: Contact Management Flow.

Complete test of contact request/approval workflow.

Test Cases:
1. Request contact from Agent A to Agent B
2. Agent B receives contact request in inbox
3. Agent B approves contact
4. Agent A can now message Agent B
5. Agent B denies contact
6. Denied agent cannot message
7. Contact policy: open (anyone can message)
8. Contact policy: contacts_only (approved only)
9. Contact policy: block_all (nobody)
10. Contact expiration after TTL
11. Cross-project contacts

Verification:
- AgentLink records created with correct status
- Policy enforcement blocks/allows messages

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-njf

functions.name: get_agent_link_from_db
functions.docstring: Get agent link details from database.

functions.name: get_agent_policy
functions.docstring: Get agent's contact policy from database.

functions.name: get_agent_id
functions.docstring: Get agent ID from project_key and name.

functions.name: get_project_id
functions.docstring: Get project ID from human_key.

functions.name: get_inbox_items
functions.docstring:
Extract inbox items from a call_tool result as a list of dicts.

FastMCP returns structured_content['result'] for list data, not directly
accessible via .data for inbox items.

functions.name: get_contacts_list
functions.docstring: Extract contacts list from list_contacts result.

functions.name: setup_two_agents
functions.docstring: Create project and two agents, return (agent_a_name, agent_b_name).

functions.name: test_request_contact_creates_pending_link
functions.docstring: Request contact creates a pending AgentLink.

functions.name: test_contact_request_appears_in_inbox
functions.docstring: Contact request sends a message to recipient's inbox.

functions.name: test_approve_contact_request
functions.docstring: Approving a contact request creates approved link.

functions.name: test_approved_agent_can_message
functions.docstring: After approval, agent A can message agent B.

functions.name: test_deny_contact_request
functions.docstring: Denying a contact request creates denied link.

functions.name: test_denied_agent_message_blocked
functions.docstring:
Denied agent cannot send messages to the denier.

Note: This test verifies behavior based on contact policy.
With contacts_only policy, denied agent should be blocked.

functions.name: test_policy_open_allows_all_messages
functions.docstring: With 'open' policy, anyone can message without approval.

functions.name: test_policy_contacts_only_requires_approval
functions.docstring: With 'contacts_only' policy, only approved contacts can message.

functions.name: test_policy_block_all_blocks_everyone
functions.docstring: With 'block_all' policy, nobody can message.

functions.name: test_list_contacts_shows_links
functions.docstring: list_contacts shows all contact links for an agent.

functions.name: test_contact_request_has_ttl
functions.docstring: Contact request has expiration time (TTL).

functions.name: test_cross_project_contact_request
functions.docstring: Contact can be requested across different projects.

functions.name: test_macro_contact_handshake
functions.docstring: macro_contact_handshake automates contact request flow.

functions.name: test_macro_contact_handshake_auto_accept
functions.docstring: macro_contact_handshake with auto_accept approves immediately.

functions.name: test_set_contact_policy_persists
functions.docstring: set_contact_policy persists to database.
